title: Manufacturing Engineer #81261
description:
Job Description

  • Industry/ Organization Type: Manufacturing
  • Position Title: Manufacturing Engineer
  • Working Location: Tai Seng
  • Working Hours: 5 days (Mon – Fri, 8.00am – 6.00pm)
  • Salary Package: Basic salary up to $4,500 + AWS + Performance Bonus
  • Duration: Permanent Role

Key Responsibilities

  • Assist in New Production Introduction criteria for the following: manufacturing process development, tool design, integrated schedules, design to cost, sourcing technical support, quality qualifications, test support, product cost out and, introduction into the supply chain.
  • Provide technical leadership for manufacturing processes of cables, harnesses, electro-mechanical assemblies, inspection, testing, tool and fixture designs.
  • Apply knowledge of electrical/ electronic equipment production and test methodologies.
  • Help to manage effectively multiple priorities under tight deadlines and bring assigned projects/programs to successful completion and profitability.
  • Gather data and develop manufacturing solutions and documentation required for supporting OMS, WI, Schematic, drawings, and specs.
  • Perform assembly work and provide guidance to technicians/operators.
  • Perform customers’ onsite support for repairs and rework related to assembly process and any other technical issue.
  • Manage daily activities of the manufacturing function including BOM, Work Instructions, Engineering Change Order (ECO) and ERP System.
  • Perform and support any assembly process during First Article & production stage to meet customer needs.

APPLY NOW!!!

  • Diploma or Degree in Electrical / Mechanical Engineering or a related professional certification.
  • Able to create/interpret (2D & 3D Cable/Mechanical Drawings, Bill of Material, Operating Procedures, Test Procedures, schematic and Interconnection Diagram, etc)
  • General knowledge of Mechanical and Electrical Engineering.
  • Good communication and leadership skills; able to train and guide junior technicians.
  • Proficient in CAD software.
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office with hand-on experience with data and Microsoft Excel reporting.

Kindly apply through ANY of the following methods:

  • Submit your application by clicking the APPLY button;
  • Email your resume to Job@anradus.com.sg. Please indicate #81261 on the email subject.

Anradus Application Policy: We value each application and ensure every resume is reviewed. Our process is efficient, typically concluding within 3 working days. If you do not receive communication from us within this timeframe, it's likely that your application has not been shortlisted by our client. In such cases, we recommend continuing your job search to maximize your opportunities.
